title: SafeMoon
html:
SafeMoon

Stub. SafeMoon is the BSC-based token Yahir held during the spring-2021 retail-crypto window. First mentioned in 2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos ("documents for safemoon (bank statements & change address)" — implying KYC/exchange paperwork) and reflected in the broader "crypto trading lessons" todo of 2021 04 27 crypto internship earning. Functions in the corpus as a marker of the early OSU crypto curious window and the learn to run before flying sequencing rule. Whether Yahir ever exited the position is undocumented.
